title: Cozy Glow Eton Mess Soy Candle – Sweet Strawberry & Meringue Scent | Handmade in The UK | Long Lasting Clean Burn | 30+ Hour Burn Time
features: Authentic Eton Mess Scent: A deliciously light and fruity blend of freshly picked strawberries, whipped cream, and sweet meringue creates a bright and uplifting aroma. This irresistible scent brings the joy of summer desserts into your home all year round.

Premium Soy Wax for a Cleaner Burn: Crafted using 100% soy wax, this candle offers a long-lasting, soot-free burn with an impressive scent throw. It’s a more sustainable and natural alternative to paraffin candles, designed to create a cleaner and fresher home environment.

Hand-Poured in the UK: Each Cozy Glow candle is made in small batches by our dedicated team to ensure exceptional quality. This hands-on approach guarantees a smooth, even burn and consistent fragrance from the first light to the last.

Long-Lasting Fragrance: With a burn time of over 30 hours, the Eton Mess candle effortlessly fills your space with its sweet, fruity scent. Perfect for kitchens, living rooms, bedrooms, or anywhere you want to add a touch of summery indulgence.

Beautiful Gift for Any Occasion: Presented in a timeless glass jar, this candle makes a thoughtful gift for birthdays, thank-yous, summer parties, or just because. It’s a unique way to share a classic British favourite with someone special.
description: Product Description Cozy Glow candles are expertly crafted using high-quality soy wax, offering a cleaner, longer-lasting burn compared to traditional paraffin candles. Designed to create a warm and inviting atmosphere, our candles fill your space with rich, immersive fragrances that enhance any moment. Our candles are made from 100% natural soy wax, which is biodegradable, non-toxic, and free from harmful chemicals. Each candle is carbon offset, with a tree planted for every purchase, ensuring a positive environmental impact. Infused with premium fragrance oils, Cozy Glow candles deliver a consistent and authentic scent experience from the first light to the last burn. The high-quality wicks ensure an even burn, reducing soot and waste. Proudly hand-poured in small batches, our candles reflect a commitment to quality craftsmanship. Each candle is carefully blended and tested to provide the perfect scent throw and burn time. Designed to complement any home decor, Cozy Glow candles come in elegantly crafted containers, making them ideal for gifting or personal indulgence. Whether you prefer fresh, floral, warm, or spicy notes, our diverse range of scents caters to every preference. Cozy Glow candles are ideal for creating a calming ambiance during relaxation, setting the mood for special gatherings, or simply adding a touch of luxury to your daily routine. They also make thoughtful gifts for birthdays, housewarmings, or seasonal celebrations. With Cozy Glow, you can trust that every candle is made with care and dedication to sustainability. Elevate your home with the soothing glow and exquisite fragrance of our handcrafted soy candles. A perfect blend of style, scent and satisfaction. Stunning colours. Gorgeous glass jar. Long burn times. Take your senses further. Pure cotton and paper wick. Every Cozy Glow candle has a pure long strand ring spun cotton and paper wick for excellent burning, reduced afterglow, smoke and soot. Biodegradable and vegan-friendly soy wax. Soy wax specifically developed for Cozy Glow candles delivering a lovely aroma. Paraben-free oils. Paraben-free and natural oils made from the finest ingredients from around the world make Cozy Glow candles unique and extensive range of fragrances. Everything Cozy Glow. We take pride in our candles because they represent the very best of what we do. Our soy wax is premium, giving you a cleaner burning product with no chemical scenting agents - just pure enjoyment every time! At this point I'd like to mention that if there's anything about your order which isn't quite right then please get back as soon as possible rest assured knowing how much care goes into each individual creation when it comes through here at Cozy Glow. About our team. Our small family team have over 10 years experience making and polishing our candles. We handmade our candles every day, striving to create the perfect candle, and we are continually experimenting with new scents to test. Cozy Glow is the go-to brand. Biodegradable Vegan-friendly Paraben-free Cruelty-free Lovingly handmade in London Small family business
